title: IODef Function
parameters:
IOType	Integer expression representing the
		 type of I/O.

		0 - Input

1 - Output

2 - Memory

IOWidth	Integer expression
		 representing the width of the port: 1(bit), 8 (byte), or 16 (word).

portNumber	Integer expression
		 representing the bit, byte, or word port number to return the
		 label for.

IOLabel	String expression
		 that specifies the standard I/O or memory I/O label.
see_also:
Returns whether the specified input or output bit, byte, word, or I/O label are defined.

IOLabel$

IONumber

IODef Function Example

Integer i

For i = 0 To 15

  If IODef( 0, 1, i) = TRUE Then

     Print "Port " , i, " is defined"

  Else

     Print "Port " , i, " is undefined"

EndIf
examples:
Integer i

For i = 0 To 15 If IODef( 0, 1, i) = TRUE Then
     Print "Port " , i, " is defined" Else
     Print "Port " , i, " is undefined"
EndIf
